messages.content: # Here is how to fix any whitelisting error

## Step 2 
> Make sure the correct steam ID is selected in Content Manager. Change it if needed.
> Settings > Content Manager > General.

## Step 3 
> **Make sure the correct account is whitelisted** by going to <#1000157728737599691> and checking to make sure the steam account matches the account with your Assetto Corsa copy that you are actively trying to play on.
> If it is not the correct one, de-link it and sign into the correct one

# Tips
> For **VIP**, if the STEAM IDs **do not** match on Content manager and the website, <#1000157728737599691>.
> Feel free to open a <#991299200782446632> ticket.

> For **Free to play** users, get in touch with a staff member in <#964650227342655499>
